name: mb
description: The orchestration layer for the AI Marketing Hub brains. One plugin to install, update, scaffold, and operate website-brain, marketing-brain, local-seo-brain, claude-obsidian, claude-ads and the fused client-intelligence-report — plus claude-mem. Ships slash commands for one-shot install, guided project init, fleet update, a fused intelligence report, and a TODO system that auto-captures every brain run into ./todos and keeps it reviewed so nothing is dropped.
